hero.title: Food Product Ad
hero.description: Create mouth-watering food product ads with AI. Generate close-up shots, slow-motion pours, steam, and texture-rich scenes that trigger appetite—perfect for CPG and restaurants.
hero.inputPlaceholder: Describe your food product, setting, and ideal serving moment

steps.title: Describe your food and key appeal
steps.description: Share cuisine type, textures, temperatures, and hero attributes (cheesy, crispy, creamy, fresh).

steps.title: Pick scene, plating, and camera style
steps.description: Choose tabletop, kitchen, restaurant, or outdoor scenarios with macro or lifestyle framing.

steps.title: Generate AI food ad sequences
steps.description: Produce dynamic shots like drizzles, close-up bites, steam reveals, and ingredient highlights.

steps.title: Export for menus, ads, and delivery apps
steps.description: Use assets across delivery platforms, social, DOOH, and brand websites.

whoIsFor.title: For brands where visuals must trigger appetite

items.question: What is the Food Product Ad workflow?
items.answer: An AI workflow for generating appetite-boosting food ad visuals with close-ups, steam, and dynamic motion.

items.question: Who should use this?
items.answer: CPG brands, restaurants, delivery platforms, and agencies needing craveable content quickly.

items.question: What inputs are required?
items.answer: Describe food type, textures, temperature, scene, plating, and camera style preferences.

items.question: What outputs will I get?
items.answer: Short, platform-ready video sequences suitable for ads, menus, and listings.

items.question: Can I customize scenes and pacing?
items.answer: Yes. Choose kitchen, restaurant, or outdoor scenes and control macro vs. lifestyle framing and pacing.

items.question: How do credits work?
items.answer: Generations consume credits based on complexity and duration. Iterate within your plan and export hero clips.
